purpose: settings.output_file_name='campaign_redirect' with output_to_file=true on the exact output-to-file-on program: the setter stores the string verbatim (pyreason.py:260-270, no path validation) and reason() interpolates it into the redirect path (pyreason.py:1514) — the output_file probe reads back campaign_redirect_<timestamp>.txt with contents identical to output-to-file-on's default-named file at authoring. The nondefault-name class (setting:output_file_name) and the interaction-filename class (setting:output_to_file): the name knob is observable precisely and only through the redirect the output knob turns on.
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md setting:output_file_name nondefault-name and setting:output_to_file interaction-filename; hello-world program, both knobs set
